founder.kicker: Built by a person, not a company
founder.title: I'm Arturo, a developer in Spain.
founder.body: I sent 200+ CVs without understanding why the ATS kept rejecting me. I built this tool for myself because ChatGPT didn't understand Spanish job postings or the CV format Spanish employers expect. Now I'm sharing it so you don't waste weeks on something you can solve in 30 seconds.

q1.question: Is it really free?
q1.answer: Yes. You can generate up to 5 tailored CV versions without paying. If you need more, there's a Pro plan.

q2.question: What happens with my data?
q2.answer: Your CV is stored encrypted in Supabase Storage as cv.pdf. When you generate an adapted version, the document is sent to MiniMax (our AI provider) for analysis. We don't sell or share your information. You can delete your account and your CV at any time from your profile.

q3.question: Does it work with English CVs?
q3.answer: Yes. The AI processes both Spanish and English CVs. The job listings we aggregate come from Spanish platforms, so they're in Spanish.

q4.question: How is this different from ChatGPT?
q4.answer: ChatGPT rewrites text, but it doesn't know which keywords the InfoJobs or LinkedIn ATS is looking for. This tool cross-references your CV with the actual job posting and highlights what the automated system is searching for.
